name: the-how-not-to-die-cookbook
description: Dr. Michael Greger's The How Not to Die Cookbook — a plant-based nutrition and cooking toolkit based on the Daily Dozen framework, with 100+ evidence-based whole-food plant-based recipes for preventing and reversing disease.
useCase: Learn the Daily Dozen framework for optimal nutrition, cook evidence-based plant-based meals, and prevent and reverse disease through diet.
knownRisks: This skill provides nutritional education — it is not medical advice. Consult a doctor before making significant dietary changes
Some of Greger's claims about specific food effects may be overstated — the overall plant-based framework is well-supported
The recipes are designed for plant-based eating — not everyone will be able or willing to follow this approach
